title: BoardRoom Finding
description: A single review finding filed by a specialist agent. FROZEN CONTRACT (v1): the orchestrator, benchmark, and the Antigravity-built report frontend all depend on this shape. Changes require architect sign-off and a version bump.

claim.description: One-sentence statement of the defect or risk

evidence.description: Every finding must cite at least one cached tool output. Uncited findings are rejected at the boundary.

evidence_id.description: Id of the cached MCP tool-call result

summary.description: What in the output supports the claim

board_region.description: Optional bounding box on the rendered board image (px), used by the VL layout critic and the report frontend highlight overlay

image.description: Render filename the box refers to

status.description: Lifecycle: open → (contested → debate) → upheld | overruled | merged

debate.description: Present when the finding entered negotiation. Max 2 rounds by protocol.

new_evidence_id.description: The one extra tool call this agent was allowed this round

conflicts_with.description: Ids of findings this one conflicts with
